summary: A silent photo-slideshow tribute marking the National Guard's 388th anniversary, pairing still images of Guard members and hurricane-relief operations with paragraph caption text thanking them and recapping their FEMA partnership during the 2024 hurricane season. It has no audio (music_score 0.0, tagged no-audio) and is a text-over-b-roll commemorative card.
notable_text: Happy Anniversary, National Guard; The National Guard responded, alongside FEMA and other partners, to the significant 2024 hurricane season; DHS thanks the National Guard for their continued partnership in protecting our great nation
